summary:
AI Transformation executive with 20+ years driving large-scale digital and workflow transformation across complex, content-driven, cross-functional environments. Currently leading a $50M AI transformation program across 15 institutions, with 14 production AI agents deployed in live operations. Deep expertise in integrating AI tools across research, documentation, content generation, and workflow automation. Proven record building AI governance frameworks, training and enabling multi-disciplinary teams, and leading cross-functional change management at scale across 8+ countries.

Core capabilities directly applicable to newsroom AI integration: AI workflow innovation, content automation, responsible AI governance, training and enablement, cross-functional collaboration, and scalable AI solution deployment. Brings the transformation leadership, execution discipline, and change management depth that media organizations need to integrate AI across editorial, creative, and production environments.

Core Competencies: AI Transformation, Workflow Innovation, Content Automation, AI Governance and Responsible AI, Change Management, Training and Enablement, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Scalable AI Solutions, Digital Transformation, Enterprise PMO, Stakeholder Alignment

experience.title: PMO and Regional Engagement Lead
bullets: Leading AI transformation across a 15-institution network, deploying 14 production AI agents in live operations covering research, documentation, content generation, and workflow automation
Developed AI governance frameworks and responsible AI best-practice guidelines adopted across the network, ensuring accuracy, verification, and content integrity standards
Designed and delivered training and enablement programs for clinical and operational teams on AI tool adoption, driving change management across 3 countries and 30+ cross-functional professionals
Integrated AI-powered solutions across research, writing, summarization, content optimization, and workflow automation workflows, directly mirroring editorial AI integration requirements
Led cross-functional coordination across clinical, content, digital, and operations teams, aligning AI-driven workflows with operational standards and creative direction
Managing $50M digital transformation program: assessed organizational needs, recommended scalable AI solutions, and delivered measurable workflow innovation at enterprise scale

experience.title: Country Manager
bullets: Led digital platform transformation integrating payments, content, e-commerce, and lifestyle services into a unified SuperApp, with AI-powered workflow automation across product, content, and operations
Built and led cross-functional teams across product, technology, content, and operations, establishing governance frameworks for responsible AI deployment on a multi-function digital platform
Developed best-practice guidelines and enablement frameworks for AI-powered workflows adopted across the platform

experience.title: Head of E-Commerce Product and IT Strategy
bullets: Led digital transformation and content workflow optimization for one of Egypt's largest consumer electronics platforms, integrating AI tools across product discovery, content automation, and digital operations
Designed scalable AI-powered solutions for content workflows, improving research, writing, and content delivery across digital channels

experience.title: Product Development Manager
bullets: Led AI and product transformation during hypergrowth: platform scaled from 30,000 to 7 million daily orders (233x growth) through AI-driven workflow innovation and content automation
Drove content automation across editorial, creative, and digital workflows, coordinating cross-functional teams across Berlin HQ, GCC, and Egypt in a complex, fast-paced matrixed environment
Developed training and enablement frameworks enabling multi-disciplinary teams to adopt new digital and AI-powered workflows at speed

experience.title: PMO Section Head
bullets: Built enterprise PMO managing 300+ concurrent digital transformation programs across 8 countries, designing governance models and best-practice guidelines adopted organization-wide
Developed training, enablement, and change management frameworks for technology and workflow adoption across diverse, multi-country teams
Designed responsible AI and digital workflow governance standards ensuring accuracy, verification, and compliance across 300+ banking and FinTech clients

experience.title: Senior Project Manager and IT Section Head
bullets: Led technology transformation and workflow integration programs across the telecoms sector, delivering cross-functional change management and scalable digital solutions

contact.name: AHMED NASR
contact.title: Head of AI Transformation and Innovation | Digital and Content Ecosystem Leader
